## Summary

- Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run generate`
- [ ] `npm run link-check:warn`
- [ ] `npm run link-check` (if links or routing changed)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation.
- [ ] I have kept this pull request focused and scoped.
- [ ] I have checked for breaking changes.
